content: GPUTreeShap / shap.GPUTreeExplainer is an experimental GPU-accelerated exact TreeExplainer; supports path-dependent (no background data; uses leaf sample counts as background) and interventional (requires background dataset). Consumes tree structure (node arrays). Exact SHAP exploits tree structure to compute output over all feature subsets. WOODELF-HD style adds vectorized Strassen-like scheme + path compression for high depth.
